title: Why Donald Trump’s '600% saving' claim on drug prices doesn’t add up
summary_full: President Trump asserted drug prices dropped over 100%, a mathematically impossible claim, defending a "different way" of calculating reductions.  He cited hypothetical scenarios of massive price hikes and subsequent drops to justify his administration's claims, drawing criticism for flawed math.  Other disputed statements on Iran and inauguration crowds were also made.
